label: Merits invalidation proxy
note: Merits invalidation target is separated from all-application invalidation because intake filtering is heavy.

label: Petition-to-judgment throughput proxy
note: Judgments divided by petitions is a rough acceptance and throughput proxy not a literal grant rate.

label: Public trust proxy
note: Public trust row is contextual and not a direct case-outcome validation.

label: Normalized capacity strain
note: Capacity strain reflects pending caseload and vacancy or resource-pressure notes.
